mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS doctorId, d.name AS doctorName, d.phone AS phone, dept.name AS departmentName, t.name AS titleName, da.specialty, da.introduction, da.certificate_url AS certificateUrl, da.qualification_url AS qualificationUrl, da.audit_status AS auditStatus, da.created_at AS registeredAt FROM doctor d INNER JOIN doctor_audit da ON d.id = da.doctor_id LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN title t ON d.title_id = t.id WHERE da.audit_status = 0 ORDER BY da.created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM doctor_audit WHERE audit_status = 0

SELECT d.id AS doctorId, d.name AS doctorName, dept.name AS departmentName, t.name AS titleName, da.certificate_url AS currentCertificateUrl, da.qualification_url AS currentQualificationUrl, da.pending_certificate_url AS pendingCertificateUrl, da.pending_qualification_url AS pendingQualificationUrl, da.updated_at AS submittedAt FROM doctor d INNER JOIN doctor_audit da ON d.id = da.doctor_id LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN title t ON d.title_id = t.id WHERE da.cert_audit_status = 0 AND (da.pending_certificate_url IS NOT NULL OR da.pending_qualification_url IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY da.updated_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM doctor_audit WHERE cert_audit_status = 0 AND (pending_certificate_url IS NOT NULL OR pending_qualification_url IS NOT NULL)

SELECT d.id AS doctorId, d.name AS doctorName, dept.name AS departmentName, t.name AS titleName, da.certificate_url AS currentCertificateUrl, da.qualification_url AS currentQualificationUrl, da.pending_certificate_url AS pendingCertificateUrl, da.pending_qualification_url AS pendingQualificationUrl, da.updated_at AS submittedAt FROM doctor d INNER JOIN doctor_audit da ON d.id = da.doctor_id LEFT JOIN department dept ON d.department_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN title t ON d.title_id = t.id WHERE d.id = #{doctorId} AND da.cert_audit_status = 0 AND (da.pending_certificate_url IS NOT NULL OR da.pending_qualification_url IS NOT NULL)
